compiled_state.author: RebarBotNava
compiled_state.description:
## Dependencies (STACKED — review with --ref HEAD)
Documents the whole identity epic shipped by ddbe/4e9d/bde5/e165/264f/2f13/3183 (all
committed on this branch). Review with `--ref HEAD`.

## Context
Document the authenticated-identity model end-to-end so operators and agents can
adopt it, and record the load-bearing architectural decisions as an ADR.

## What
### 1. `docs/identity.md` — the identity model end-to-end
A new operator/agent guide covering, with concrete `rebar identity …` examples:
- **The `identity` entity** (`src/rebar/…`): a gate/graph/Jira-sync-exempt ticket-type
  (like `session_log`) holding name, email, `{provider, external_id}` mappings, and
  public keys; the `.rebar/current_identity` self-identity pointer.
- **Tiers**: real identities vs. `placeholder` ghosts (inbound-minted, idempotently
  upgraded) — how to tell them apart (`is_placeholder`) and how ghosts get promoted.
- **Event attribution**: every local event carries denormalized `author`/`author_email`
  + optional `author_id`; replay back-compat.
- **Authorship attestation** (`rebar.authorship.v1`): SSHSIG over the foundation attest
  substrate; trust root = the identity's in-band keys.
- **Key rotation / era-scoping**: TOFU genesis, signed add/revoke, epoch-scoped validity
  (`identity key add|revoke`), and WHY validity is merged-log-position (epoch) not
  wall-clock.
- **Provider-neutral Jira mapping**: outbound assignee/reporter by opaque accountId, the
  `/user/search` bootstrap, and the **Modify-Reporter** permission constraint +
  documented degradation.
- **Opt-in enforcement**: `identity.require_authenticated`, the write-gate, and the
  crucial **"the merge-gate is the control; the local write-gate is UX-only"** caveat;
  replay-never-rejects; `rebar verify-authorship`.

### 2. ADR `docs/adr/0045-authenticated-identity.md`
Records the load-bearing decisions and their rationale/alternatives:
- **git-bug-style entity**: identity as a first-class event-sourced ticket entity
  (reusing the exempt-type substrate) rather than a side table.
- **Opaque-id keying**: mappings keyed on the provider's stable opaque id, NEVER email.
- **In-band TOFU**: trust-on-first-use genesis keys carried in-band on the identity,
  with a signed rotation chain (filling git-bug's IsProtected), and era-scoped validity.

### 3. Docs index
Add `docs/identity.md` (and the ADR per the ADR-dir convention) to the docs index so
the docs-index completeness gate stays green.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/identity.md` exists and covers ALL of: the identity model, tiers, opt-in
  enforcement + the merge-gate-is-the-control caveat, Jira accountId mapping +
  Modify-Reporter constraint, key-rotation/era-scoping, and the provider-neutral seam.
- [ ] `docs/adr/0045-authenticated-identity.md` exists and records the git-bug-entity,
  opaque-id-keying, and in-band-TOFU decisions (context / decision / consequences).
- [ ] The docs-index completeness gate passes (`python scripts/check_docs_index.py
  --check` exits 0) with the new docs indexed.

## file_impact
- `docs/identity.md` (new operator/agent guide)
- `docs/adr/0045-authenticated-identity.md` (new ADR)
- the docs index file (add the new docs so check_docs_index passes)

file_impact.reason: new operator/agent guide for the identity model

compiled_state.title: identity: docs + ADR (model, tiers, enforcement, Jira mapping, rotation)
